overview: Smoke fixture for target_files grounding: one in-bounds path (src/worker/ingest.py, under the component's code_location) and one out-of-bounds path (src/legacy/ingest.py) that must surface a non-blocking placement-drift WARNING. Kept as a DRAFT so the advisory check is the focus, not the exactly-one-target_files or coverage gates.

tasks.title: Implement the ingest worker
tasks.description: Implement job ingestion + processing for the worker.
outputs: ingest pipeline available to the scheduler
acceptance: queued jobs are pulled and processed
